channel.title: +Backup on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Backup on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Knowledge preservation
item.description: How to best preserve our knowledge (physical and spiritual) and texts? See - https://rebrand.ly/dg-archive Media Lists of oldest surviving documents - wiki 6k+ yr Ceramic microfilms Ceramic microfilm MOM project, which is a 1 mm thick rock-hard sheet 8 x 8 inches (20 × 20 cm). The tablets can withstand alkali and acid environments, but also temperatures up to 1300 degrees Celsius. A laser is then used to etch character, full-colour graphics.
